welcome.title: Welcome to Footprint!
welcome.subtitle: Your account is almost ready. We just need a bit more information about you and your company.

user-data.title: Tell us about you
user-data.subtitle: Please provide some basic personal information

company-data.title: Tell us about your company
company-data.subtitle: Please provide some basic company information

invite.title: Invite teammates
invite.subtitle: Invite your teammates to join you on Footprint

allow-domain-access.title: Allow domain access
allow-domain-access.subtitle: Allow users with email addresses with this domain to join your team with read-only access without requiring an invite.

toggle.cta-not-allowed: You're not allowed to toggle domain access
toggle.domain-already-claimed: Domain access for {{domain}} has already been claimed. Please contact your admin to invite you to the existing organization.

in-progress.title: Onboarding pending
in-progress.description: We noticed that you have an incomplete onboarding with <bold>{{tenantName}}</bold>. If you want to finalize your onboarding, or need support, please continue on their website or app instead.
in-progress.description-many: We noticed that you have an incomplete onboarding with <bold>{{tenantNameFirst}}</bold> and <bold>{{tenantNameSecond}}</bold>. If you want to finalize your onboarding, or need support, please continue on their website or app instead.
in-progress.cta-alternative: No, create a Footprint business account

are-you-sure.title: Are you sure?
are-you-sure.description-single: If you're a business looking to enhance customer verification and streamline compliance, we'd love to show you how Footprint can help. If you need to complete your onboarding with <b/>, or need support, please <link/>
are-you-sure.description-many: If you're a business looking to enhance customer verification and streamline compliance, we'd love to show you how Footprint can help. If you need to complete your onboarding with <b1 />, or <b2 />, or need support, please go to their website or app instead.
are-you-sure.link-text: go to their website or app instead.
